headline: KeyCorp Community Investment With YWCA May Influence ESG Focused Investors
summary: KeyBank Foundation, affiliated with KeyCorp (NYSE:KEY), is investing in YWCA North Central Indiana's Strengthening Communities Initiative. The funding supports survivors of abuse and economically vulnerable individuals through education and workforce development programs. The partnership focuses on community resilience and empowerment in YWCA North Central Indiana's service area. For readers tracking regional banks, this move highlights another side of KeyCorp beyond traditional lending and...
